creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
update to 0.5, cleanup
	support SMTP relay after successful pop3 authenication.

Fix: maintainer mailed at: 22th Decmber 2001

	note removed/delete:
		files.smtp/POPAUTH
		files.smtp/patch-aa files.smtp/patch-ab
		files.smtp/patch-pop_auth.c files.smtp/patch-pop_pbs.c
		files.smtp/patch-pop_root.c
		files.smtp/popauth.m4

	install patches:

diff popa3d/Makefile popa3d/Makefile
